title: Credit Analysis Agentic Workflow
description: Engineered a Cash Scoring XGBoost model achieving 86% ROC-AUC and an automated Agentic Workflow for feature creation. Built a transformer model to categorize bank statements with 95% accuracy.

title: Effect of Strike Counts on Swing
description: Full-stack data analysis from preprocessing to panel data regression. Built an interactive website with 3D models and narrative elements to communicate MLB swing mechanics to non-technical viewers.

title: Balanced Meal... Not
description: A comparative data visualization analyzing the nutritional value of pre-packaged meals against standard health guidelines. Awarded Best Project.

title: 2025 Market Mega Trend
description: Comprehensive macro-economic trend analysis forecasting global market movements for the upcoming year.

title: HMM Stock Analysis
description: Bottom-up fundamental research on HMM to evaluate investment opportunities driven by Northern Sea Route (NSR) expansion.
